basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Program Assistant II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) Program Assistant II Notification 2026 has been released on 30 April 2026 on the official website of IIT Gandhinagar. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Gandhinagar Program Assistant II Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.C.A./B.Sc./B.A./B.Com./B.B.A./LLB. or equivalent with 2 years experience
qualification.details: Program Assistant II: B.C.A./B.Sc./B.A./B.Com./B.B.A./LLB. or equivalent with minimum 02 years post-qualification experience. Minimum 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onward and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Gandhinagar Program Assistant II Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Gandhinagar Program Assistant II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Program Assistant II position at IIT Gandhinagar is 10th May 2026. Ensure all your details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Program Assistant II post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.C.A./B.Sc./B.A./B.Com./B.B.A./LLB. or an equivalent degree with at least 2 years of post-qualification experience. Additionally, a minimum of 60% in graduation and 55% in 10th and 12th are required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Program Assistant II position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Program Assistant II role will receive a consolidated salary ranging from ₹ 35,000/- to ₹ 55,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Program Assistant II post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Program Assistant II position at IIT Gandhinagar as per the latest recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Gandhinagar Program Assistant II recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the official website or the provided link.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Program Assistant II at IIT Gandhinagar is a contractual role. Candidates will be appointed on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Gandhinagar located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar is located in Gandhinagar, Gujarat.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is DPA/20147/Advt0190.

faq.question: Q10. What is the notification date for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification for this recruitment was released on 30th April 2026.
